creator: jeremy@smart-serv.net
text: (In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #4) I had replied to the bug report and thought it would automatically re-open the bug but apparently this is not how bugzilla works. I attached a patch to the previous bug report that needs to be applied that corrects the pkg-message and installs the db upgrade scripts that are included in newer versions that were not included when I first created the port.
